creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$ cd /usr/ports/www/typo3
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/www/typo3]$ sudo genplist clean; sudo genplist create /tmp/
[...]
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]

pkg-plist.new contains now:

===> Options unchanged
/you/have/to/check/what/makeplist/gives/you
%%WWWDIR%%/INSTALL.txt
%%WWWDIR%%/README.txt
%%WWWDIR%%/RELEASE_NOTES.txt
%%WWWDIR%%/_.htaccess
[...]

[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/www/typo3]$ sudo genplist commit
This will overwrite pkg-plist with pkg-plist.new.
Are you sure? (y/[n]) y
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/www/typo3]$ port test
===> Using ports tree /usr/ports
===> Validating port with portlint
FATAL: /usr/ports/www/typo3/pkg-plist: [2]: use of full pathname disallowed.
1 fatal error and 0 warnings found.
Error validating port
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/www/typo3]$
